item.description:
### Added
- Added an optional standalone Refresh command to Finder background context menus. - Clicking Refresh produces a brief nostalgic screen flash without changing files. - Added a Settings toggle for showing or hiding the Refresh command.
### Fixed
- Fixed a crash caused by the initial animated flash-window cleanup. - Removed separator items that Finder rendered as oversized blank gaps around Refresh.
### Notes
- Finder controls the placement of extension-provided commands, so RightMenu cannot guarantee that Refresh appears directly below the system New Folder command.
